---
title: "test_odin_scenarios.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_odin_scenarios.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.30
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.93
---

## Intent
The `test_odin_scenarios.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_generate_scenario_deterministic, test_generate_scenario_different_turn. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_generate_scenario_deterministic, test_generate_scenario_different_turn. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios)

### Exports
- `test_generate_scenario_deterministic`
- `test_generate_scenario_different_turn`
